rationale: Both reviews correctly identify the same three scope problems (bundled AffineAlgGroup, naïve IsUnipotent, stub ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup before prerequisites) and would lead to nearly identical resulting PRs — all substantive code removed until prerequisite layers exist. The only difference is whether AffineAlgGroup is replaced by unbundled assumptions or two smaller classes, a minor design preference immaterial to the blocked outcome.
